reviews.review_description:
I really like this game the different cans, nozzles, and maps I do think this game would be so much better if it had multiplayer I do know thats a lot to ask for but just a suggestion and the customization is also nice anyway 5 stars 
(Edit: it says multiplayer on the description i didnt see that lol)

￼

reviews.review_title: Five stars if fadings work better!
reviews.review_description:
I love this game. The tools are great, the immersion is excellent, and being able to put the caps on the cans yourself is a really nice touch. The locations are excellent as well.

The only thing that bothers me is that I’m not able to create really smooth fades. It would be awesome if you could improve that 😊
I guess multiplayer is already on your list 😉

Its just one of the best vr graffiti apps I enjoy using so much. But I do have a problem with the camera, for some reason the camera keeps flicking back to the default direction (So it keeps flicking my direction back to north while I am west) it happens constantly and it makes it very hard to actually play and enjoy

Having been painting graffiti for 15 years im blown away by this game. Extremely close to the real thing . Cap selection, paint selection all spot on. You can get  all the effects from a real can like fades, flares, dust, drips.  Fades work well in my opinion.

My only feedback would be when using the projector the spray paint is displayed beneath the projected image, when it should be infront of it.

Love this app. Love the maps. The colors . The caps. The tools. Projector for the toys. Lol a lil bit of everything.  Multi-player and music options would be awesome. I get stuck in there for hours. Highly recommend if you're serious about stepping up your skills.

reviews.review_title: Anyone know how to correctly upload
reviews.review_description:
Game is super dope!!! Cant wait for new maps but does anyone know how to correct step by step upload photos onto the app/projector to use them?
Thanks

after being caught doing graff, i havent got any balls to go out painting again. This is so good for it. I don’t have to worry about being caught again and getting beat. Sick spots and updates love this game. Just need to have multiplayer tho.

This is a great game. I feel like it would be better if it had more maps more tools. Also multiplayer is a big thing and maybe more music from YouTube or something just basically more maps more tools ￼
I genuinely believe negative reviews are a skill thing or nitpicking. It's a vr spray painting game on a quest. You're using a quest so expect quest quality. Its the best one out.
I am really impressed with this game. I would have liked more tips. And a couple of them to work properly. And maybe some card board to block over spray and the undo button to work constantly

Love this app! I get to paint and practice without spending or wasting paint... rainy days and when you got the itch... just chill out and relax without looking over your shoulder... the mechanics are great. I bought a quest 2 just for kingspray but now im on quest3 rockin graffism. Plus all the updates to come got me hype..... to the devs "keep up the great work"!

I’m not much of an artistic person, but here and there I get the creative itch to do something cool and so far this game has been the perfect way for me to do that. 

Never done graffiti irl, but I have spray painted quite a lot and this game is about as close as it gets for VR to the mechanics and feel of using a real can. 

I understand they are still adding more to the game and I’m excited to see what comes. 

I’d like to suggest a seated game mode, or maybe more adjustment to the height levels. I tend to play this sitting in an office chair because my knees and back won’tallow for me to stand as long as I’d like to work on a piece , and it would be nice to be able to reach the top of a piece without having to stand up. 

And a “reference” feature would be nice. Something you could upload pictures into and pull up on the in game table for viewing maybe?Just an idea!

Other thank that, I have no issues or complaints! If you want something fun to just mess around with, test your creativity, or just pass some time, I highly recommend Graffism!

Lots to do, lots of tools, caps, cans and markers. 6 maps; skatepark, elevated train, paint room (has a box truck, locomotive, canvas, and container) train yard, subway station, and roof top. There is a lack of movement, you can't jump or run but you can walk, easy to figure out, highly recommended.

reviews.review_title: If you paint you need this!! 10/10 *****
reviews.review_description:
I wasn’t sure what to expect as I’ve never tried anything like this. …First VR game/app I bought too.
I can defo say it’s worth having a headset for
just in itself. …It’s absolute diamond quality!
The developers are constantly working on anything and everything too, they listen to what the community asks for and keep making it even better.
The updates just keep on coming! …Good stuff too!
I can sit and paint on this for hours!
It’s a great chilled out way to use a VR headset.
I paint myself, and the spray mechanics are great.
I’ve been painting since 2001 and love this!!!
If you’re thinking about it, just buy this!!
You won’t regret it!

This is not a multiplayer game and it was not worth the price. 

There’s nothing going on there and you’re very limited to the environments. 

￼

reviews.review_title: worth the money for the details
reviews.review_description: Great game been playing for like a week now a multiplayer would be cool to chill with friends or some kind of street paint competition world. Really enjoying it so far fading is abit annoying but good so far!

reviews.review_title: THE BEST SPRAY PAINT GAME EVER
reviews.review_description: THIS GAME IS THE BEST I SUCK AT DRAWING BUT THIS MADE ME BETTER! DIFFERENT MAPS A DRONE CAMERA AND GLOVES THE BEST PART IS ITS MULTIPLAYER! 10/10 DEFINITELY WOULD RECOMMEND!

reviews.review_title: Please read, I have an idea
reviews.review_description: This is a really realistic game. It is super good with high quality models and paint, but the red paint looks a lot like blood, so maybe just maybe we could have a shooting game that had hyper realistic models and good blood unlike other games, but this is just a suggestion. I don’t know if it’s possible, but if it is, it would be AWESOME 👏
Pls ta med multiplayer
The spots won't load and just a black screen?!? I tried uninstall and reinstall and same thing. I lost all of my saved stuff 😭
It’s just so smooth, absolute cinema
As an person who does Graffiti irl i can really tecomend this game!

So, just for context, I bought my quest 2 back in 2022 just so I could play kingspray. Kingspray is incredible and enabled the entire community to do vr graffiti, however, it has been lacking in updates for some years now.
I found out about Graffism yesterday and have already tried all the details.
It is a BIG step up from kingspray when it comes to overall painting experience. It's clear that it's still an early access game when it comes to small ui settings and options and maps but i'dd still buy it if there were not going to be any updates (and the developers are doing everything absolutely right by providing a road map for updates). Anyone who paints knows that cans are expensive af and 25$ for infinite realistic painting experience is basically for free.
Recommend it 1000%

reviews.review_title: Side spray/ flares are great in this
reviews.review_description:
All the other apps do not simulate the actual natural properties of spray paint as well as them and they have namebrand materials, which is fun too
￼

Bro, I really hope they add features like in "Getting up" I'm sure y'all get that a lot..lol multiple players would be dope with straight pulling missions ..lol take to long 5.0 pulls up .lol  free world RPG. I'll be adding more to this review once I dive deeper. I'm excited. Just purchased ✊🏽
Great game, nice controls, get lost in it for hours. I think this game is better than king spray as the devs actually work on it. Overall very good game.

I have the most toy tag you could imagine.. when I tell you how terrible it looks meaning how realistic and accurate this is. I’m super impressed because I thought it would give me some type of crutch or edge but it don’t and it’s very accurate to IRL tagging
Game of year definently. It was already Much better then kingspray when it was in beta. Love it

With The fully paintable walls and floors, it makes a great kind of explorer game with how much areas you can spray paint. With the wide range of tools from spray paint cans, markers and mops, extinguisher, a ladder and even a boom box to easily listen to music while doing a throwie or something.
I rate this game five stars, I can’t wait for future updates.
Big Time Fun for all graffiti Artists and best Training option for spraypaint  Enthusiasts. Get's better since the Developers are working on little and bigger Updates.

The app has potential, but the brush control is a serious issue right now. For character design it’s almost unusable, because the pressure comes in too strong, making real graffiti-style fading on short elements impossible. The caps also produce strange dots when moved quickly, which causes outlines at higher speeds to look shaky and uneven – the opposite of real graffiti, where lines stay consistent or taper smoothly in curves.

Cell-shaded characters are possible to some extent, but the lack of clean outlines means too much correction work, which kills the flow. For me, clean and fast fades and stable outlines would be far more important than extras like drips.

Another problem shows up with metallic colors: when drawing red outlines around chrome silver, a distracting white edge appears around the red. This makes classic bombing combinations like chrome/reds practically unusable. Red/white works, but that’s a major limitation.

Bottom line: the brush engine needs urgent rework – pressure control, outline stability, and metallic color rendering are critical if Graffism is to become a serious tool for writers and character artists.

Graffism is an excellent spray paint simulation, the can control is great and the flaring of different caps is very realistic. The developers have obviously put a lot of work into this and have a great roadmap of future content planned, this is looking to be the greatest in graffiti entertainment, there is obviously some passionate writers involved with the production thankyou for your hard work team! I can't wait for the addition of multiplayer later in the year and I hope the Devs continue to bless this game with some true style
Surpassed Kingspray and more
Best graffiti vr game ever. Its so fun. Works great. Got to have if your a artist.  Or. Just want to vandalized on stuff.
Ad multiplayer but very www
Love the game but please add this

These guys really nailed it in this one ! Let’s be honest..King Spray was awesome. But GRAFFISM is WAAAAAAAY better x100 !! I can’t wait to check out the multi player. The creators are working full time to make sure there are no bugs and are open to communication and suggestions. You will love this one :))

This is the best game because it outdid itself! Way better then kingspray but price is higher, but it makes sense why when you get the game 🤩 the graphics are amazing and so is everything else! I've had no problems since I got this game. Again if your thinking of buying DO IT

I got this game on release after waiting 5 months in a discord and then sitting watching for release for 2 hours.
It's hit every expectation, graphically and in terms of can control, ambience in the spots to paint, markers A FIRE EXTINGUISHER. I spend a lot of time painting in real life and this so far has to be the closest I've gotten to a realistic experience in vr. 10 out of 10 can't wait for full release and more spots.

I was unsure about trying this in early access but it's well worth it. The spray mechanic is the most realistic I've tried so far. Much better than other games of the same type. Much better to get clean lines and it feels more re
alistic. The fact you can paint nearly ever surface adds to the feel and immersion. 

I'm sure this game will only get better and better!

This game is definitely better than its counterpart Kingspray, but the game did not scratch the itch for me. The controls are a lot harder compared to IRL, and I do not find them realistic. I had very high expectations, and I think that ruined my experience. I think it is too early to buy the game; it needs more development. It is really annoying to apply caps and change colors.

I would still recommend it to someone that wants a graffiti VR game because it does fulfill that part. I will refund it and might buy it later when it has been in development for a longer time.

$25 is too high a price, in my opinion; $17 would be a more reasonable price.

Graffism is the best graffiti game out here the spray mechanics feel real, the tools give endless freedom, and the creative flow makes every session relaxing and inspiring. Its not like any other game where you can only do whatever you want on one wall, you can use the whole map. Graffism is the game of the year by far.

In my opinion, this is the best VR graffiti experience currently available. And I believe it will continue to be so as there are regularly scheduled updates, a budding community, and passionate and attentive developers. Graffism VR is where I spend 90% of my time when using my meta quest 3
Its definitely way better than Kingspray. In Kingspray you only have 1 wall that you can spray on, here you can spray on everything. the extra 10 bucks are worth it.

When I first got the game, I left a negative review and I want to apologize for that. I didn’t take the time to fully explore the settings or check out the helpful discussions on the Discord. After digging deeper, I realized many of the things I disliked were actually customizable. Reading through the community threads really opened my eyes to the potential of the game. Looking forward to future updates and would love to see some tutorials that break down all the features and options. Keep up the great work!

Great game, and its still on early access! The Devs are amazing in their discord, and seem to have a vision and the backing to really push Graffism to the top! Can't wait to see where it goes, regarding upcoming content, as their roadmap looks brilliant. Well done fellas!
Fist time was the best time i had

Now I dont usually write reviews but This game is absolutely amazing for people who are new to graffiti it helps them learn the basics and to get a feel of what it might be like in real life I would 100% recommend this to anyone trying out graffiti this game offers infinite amount of creativity and is a great way to practice your graffiti. Love the game can’t wait to see what they can do with it in the future keep it up!❤️🤟🏻

reviews.review_title: A great game is shaping up
reviews.review_description: This game stands out with the ability to paint on most surfaces, the introduction of different can sizes, and other tools such as markers and even a fire extinguisher available. There are also caps in partnership with nightquill, and more partnerships are rumored to be on the way. The painting system and sounds already feel quite polished, and im excited for what future updates bring.

reviews.review_title: Add the paint roller and skate park map
reviews.review_description:
It’s a great game but in the previews it shows a paint roller and more maps than it really has but it doesn’t have it in game 
Please add those things back paint roller and skate park 
Btw the game is super realistic

developer_response.body: Thanks Sammy. If you can check our roadmap these features are coming soon as we have only early access at the moment. We hope to deliver them soon and we hope you enjoy them!

reviews.review_description:
Having a phenomenal time with this game! The levels and atmosphere are so immersive, especially the rooftop. The amount of paint tools and fun you can have with them mean there’s no limits to what you can create and do. Almost all areas are paintable.

The devs are very responsive and listening to feedback, as it’s still in Eatly Access. So excited to see the game as it develops after seeing the roadmap.

Highly recommend for any artists of any background.

reviews.review_title: The Next level in VR Graffiti
reviews.review_description: If you are a Graffiti Writer you will love this Simulator game. Updates every month. I am Looking forward to a massive array of new levels and maybe even more i hope.
Hands down best graffiti vr game, excited to see what's to come.

You truly feel the effort that’s been put into the game. the paints behavior is much more realisticthan in other comparable simulations and the variety of things you can do is great! You can put a full detailed Piece next to your tag with a marker and put a fire extinguisher tag next to that! The only limitation is more or less your own creativity. These are the tools and the rest is up to you. Big props to the devs for making this reality and best of fun to you playing this game❤️❤️

I've tried every option in the meta store and this is by far the best one! Graphics, movement, overall feel and realistic is some of what makes this game/simulation awesome! It has a great dedicated Dev team and a strong community so there's lots of support as well! Prefect for both beginners and veterans.

so far enjoying the game, definitely has its kinks but that's to be expected in early access. very excited to see how the future fairs for this game i will 100% be playing continuously as i have high hopes for this and the creators actually are paying attention to feedback which helps confirm the care they have for this now and going forward.

I was only able to play it for just a an hour. But is definitely worth it. The environments that are in the game now definitely give the feeling of being out in the streets. The markers are fun. And didn’t think I’d have fun with the fire extinguisher. For a beta it’s off to a good start and can’t wait for to experience the future of this game. Don’t sleep on this game!!!

by far the best graffiti related game out there.
Might need a few improvements here and there, but physics and feeling are amazing.
Simulates utilizing spraypaint in different settings. Pretty realistic for VR and fun 🔥
Another great graffiti simulator! Has some great content that others do not and spraying is buttery smooth. Also like that future updates are planned. 👍

Game runs smooth, painting feels realistic, lots of different tools like markers, mops, and fire extinguisher. Painting on every surface and angled spray mechanic is dope. Devs are active and have a nice road map for the game.

reviews.review_title: Got it right when it dropped
reviews.review_description: It’s amazing, 10x better than kingspray. It has much better flow and ut just feels much more nice. They also have different cans, markers and alot of other stuff. 10/10 must buy!
Ive been in the discord group since thr game was in the making, and honestly I couldnt be more satisfied with the game! From markers to cans its awesome :D

Buy the game to support the developement. Need major improvements, on navigation on the menus and the environment manipulation options aswell as the spraying. To slow to make a normal line.. faaaar from reality. Keep working, very expensive for what it is right now.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your support. We get a lot of feedback and one by one everything gets updated. And all updates and upcoming scenes shown on our roadmap will be free for Early Release buyers. So pls stay tuned and thanks a lot

reviews.review_description: One of the best vr games I’ve played in a while ! Took a little to get use to but once I figured out everything it was a cake walk ! Been playing every day since I got it ! I highly recommend this game

Sooo much better than the other game, it has everything that you need and paint behaves in such realistic way. I love it and I cannot wait for updates! Good to see graffiti game with loving development team!
The game has alot of potential and can't wait for more updates and maps, most of the tools feel natural to use and its fun to run around and paint on whatever.

Painting experience is smooth!
For an early access game, this game will surely blossom into one of the best VR experiences to date. It’s only going to get better with each update.
I was thinking it was too nice to exist but i was wrong it’s finally here and it rocks ! very nice simulation don’t hesitate ❤️
Good game, with a lot of features that were missing from other graffiti games, and will only get better with future updates.
I love this game!
Once you get the settings adjusted, you will love this game. It has potential to get better as time goes on
Even though it’s early release and I am looking forward to it receiving its first update I would still 100% recommend it. Great stuff
So far so gooood hope to see an update coming! Cant wait for this to fully drop.
Goated game, beats kingspray 100%
Just awesome, the best graffiti game out there by far.
Really good simulator but,i think kore maps would be good.But other than that its really really good. For the money its worth it.💪
Five stars game is honestly the best graffiti game out there or even the best game out I recommend it

I really like the Game so far !!
I wait for new Spots a caps 🚨🚨🔥
Cant want for the next updates
Might be a little confusing but definitely the best feeling spray paint sim
